subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: You had a meeting today with the Hebrews from Hamadan! These good people have suffered a great deal for the Cause, they have suffered exceedingly.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
